## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] fix
- [ ] feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] breaking change
- [ ] docs

## Compatibility checklist

- [ ] No public API removal in `1.x`
- [ ] Existing config keys still work
- [ ] Changelog updated

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Local example checked (if visual/runtime change)
